title: Pinchbus Alive Villages
description: Pinchbus Alive Villages is a mod that aims to change villages into more lively versions!
body:
#  ***Welcome to Pinchbus Alive Villages***

Brings your villages to the standard you would expect from a studio as large as mojang that truly create the sense of, this is a village and not this is a few houses on a path.

Pinchbus Alive Villages transforms standard Minecraft villages into vibrant, large settlements that feel truly Alive and more "modpack friendly". 

***A Truly Village experince***
Every Single Building is generally much larger, much more "like a town". Decor such as pots (so many pots) are everywhere, no more just a candle or pot for interior design.

***More Village***
Villages now feature beautiful buildings that are not shacks and more building styles between. 
Markets have proper market stools, Houses have rooms , farms are somewhat large.

***A Vanilla+ Experience***
I try to follow a Vanilla plus building style that is similar to the old village though not the same as seen in the savanna village. It’s a perfect fit for almost any modpack focusing on upgrading the lives of villagers or just good to blend in with the rest of the game.

![Market](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f4c2e588c8c7e9858705fbf2525e17008a825be.jpeg)

For those who liked the removed villages they will return some day most likely in a new mod or in a new project alltogether.
